follow_up_retrieval.interpretation: MRR=0.748: label-free metadata can rank follow-up scan pairs near top-1 without manual labels.

flair_only.note: FLAIR alone retains most domain-shift signal

modality_missingness.conclusion: FLAIR acquisition parameters carry the most site-specific information. Domain classifier degrades gracefully with modality missingness.

feature_importance.interpretation: Voxel spacing and scanner model dominate domain classification. Clinical deployment should monitor these two parameters for acquisition shift detection.

acquisition_shift_threshold.rule: If domain classifier P(Yale-like) > 0.60 for any scan, flag for radiologist review
acquisition_shift_threshold.recommendation: Deploy label-free domain classifier as first-pass acquisition-quality screen.
